entity.summary: Linea-native decentralized exchange and liquidity layer supporting token swaps, liquidity pools, automated-liquidity-manager strategies, emissions voting, trading-fee distribution, and protocol liquidity incentives.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and documentation identify Lynex as Linea's native liquidity layer and active decentralized trading platform. The live application exposes swaps and liquidity functions, while the protocol describes trading fees, routing, managed liquidity, automated liquidity managers, governance, and emissions. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Lynex native liquidity layer
evidence.notes: Current first-party website links the live DEX application and documents swaps, trading fees, liquidity pools, automated-liquidity-manager strategies, routing, governance, and emissions.

evidence.title: About Lynex
evidence.notes: First-party documentation defines Lynex as a Linea-native liquidity marketplace and exchange environment for traders, liquidity providers, protocols, voting, incentives, and managed liquidity.
